summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Mar, 5 2026 US stock futures are pointing lower this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts off about 0.4%, as investors weigh mixed signals on growth and interest rates. headline: Trump Crypto Endorsement Puts Coinbase Outlook And Valuation In Focus
summary: Former President Donald Trump held a private meeting with Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) CEO Brian Armstrong, followed by public comments in support of cryptocurrency. Trump has voiced backing for digital asset legislation, signaling potential shifts in U.S. political and regulatory support for crypto.
